center.name: Carl Jakob Sundevall
center.summary: Carl Jakob Sundevall是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括African collared dove、Grasshopper buzzard、南红嘴犀鸟等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African collared dove (Streptopelia roseogrisea) is a small dove found in the Sahel, northern parts of the Horn of Africa and southwestern Arabia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fasciolata at Tswalu Kalahari Reserve, South Africa | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Corypha (bird) | species = fasciolata | authority = (Sundevall, 1850) | synonyms = * Alauda fasciolata * Mirafra damarensis | range_map = Eastern_Clapper_Lark.png | range_map_caption = }} The eastern clapper lark (Corypha fasciolata) is a small passerine bird which breeds in southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Grasshopper buzzard in The Gambia, West Africa The grasshopper buzzard (Butastur rufipennis) is a species of bird of prey in the family Accipitridae which is found in a narrow zone of sub-Saharan Africa north of the equator

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-breasted swallow (Cecropis semirufa), also known as the rufous-chested swallow, is a member of the family Hirundinidae, found in Sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The striped pipit (Anthus lineiventris) is a species of bird in the family Motacillidae, which is native to Africa southwards of the equator

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Wahlberg's eagle (Hieraaetus wahlbergi) is a bird of prey that is native to sub-Saharan Africa, where it is a seasonal migrant in the woodlands and savannas. It is named after the Swedish naturalist Johan August Wahlberg

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: P.]] | image2 = Yellow-rumped Tinkerbird (Pogoniulus bilineatus) (022A-WA03044X0025-0010M0).ogg | image2_caption = Call recorded in Saiwa Swamp, Kenya | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Pogoniulus | species = bilineatus | authority = (Sundevall, 1850) | synonyms = *Barbatula bilineata }} The yellow-rumped tinkerbird (Pogoniulus bilineatus) is a bird species in the family Lybiidae (African barbets), which is native to the moist tropical and subtropical regions of sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The southern red-billed hornbill (Tockus rufirostris) is a species of hornbill in the family Bucerotidae, which is native to the savannas and dryer bushlands of southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: woltersi, Mozambique | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Amblyospiza | parent_authority = Sundevall, 1850 | species = albifrons | authority = (Vigors, 1831) | synonyms = * Pyrrhula albifrons Vigors, 1831 }} The thick-billed weaver (Amblyospiza albifrons), or grosbeak weaver, is a distinctive and bold species of weaver bird that is native to the Afrotropics

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pink-billed lark (Spizocorys conirostris) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Estrilda rhodopyga |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719562A263828821 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719562A263828821.en |access-date=19 June 2025}} | taxon = Estrilda rhodopyga | authority = Sundevall, 1850 }} The crimson-rumped waxbill (Estrilda rhodopyga) also known as rosy-rumped waxbill is a common species of estrildid finch found in eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dusky lark (Pinarocorys nigricans), also known as the dusky bush lark or rufous-rumped bush lark, is a species of migratory lark in the family Alaudidae. It is native to southern Central Africa
